_description: Maps postcodes to their collection day and zone. Add more by looking up postcodes on newrymournedown.org/weekly-bin-collection-and-calendar
_zoneNaming: Zone letters (Z, V) are geographic area identifiers shared across days. The ref is DAY + ZONE (e.g. MON Z1, TUES Z2, WED Z2 are different schedules). Both Z and V zones appear on multiple days.
